Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 129 

MASBOE_CD_LTST 

LABEL: Maintenance Assistance Status and Basis of Eligibility Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A beneficiary’s Maintenance Assistance Status and Basis of Eligibility (MASBOE) group. This is a three-
character designation, where the first character indicates the beneficiary’s Maintenance Assistance 
Status (MAS), e.g., “medically needy”, and
